name: dev-framework
description: AI-led development framework built on Managed Agents architecture. Two skills for the two shapes of engineering work: /spike (multi-ticket research and decomposition) and /implement (single-ticket rigorous execution, renamed from /dev in v4.0). Both skills share one epic-scoped event log (events.jsonl) with derivable views, stateless restart (wake.sh), seq-level replay, and multi-brain fan-out. Plan docs live in-repo under docs/plan/{epic}/ with bi-directional plan-ticket reference updates. /implement retains freeze-doc-enforced research/execution boundary and two user approval gates. Retro-per-skill: code patterns in /implement, design patterns in /spike. modelProfile config knob tunes iteration counts as model capabilities evolve.
